analysis.name: Alchemist AI
analysis.summary: ALCH近期上涨主要受AI Agent概念热度和Alchemy推出AgentCard接入Visa网络等利好驱动，但基本面缺乏实质进展，市值已超6000万美元，短期涨幅较大，追高风险较高。

recommendation.invalidation: 若价格跌破0.065美元或成交量持续萎缩，则上涨逻辑失效

catalysts: Alchemy AgentCard接入Visa网络，AI代理可进行链下支付
AI Agent赛道整体热度回升

latestNews.title: Alchemy’s AgentCard gains access to Visa network for AI transactions
latestNews.reason: AI代理支付场景落地，提升代币实用性预期

latestNews.title: AI Agents Can Spend on Visa's Network With Alchemy's New AgentCard
latestNews.reason: 主流媒体报道，扩大市场关注度

latestNews.title: Crypto is built for AI agents, not humans, says Alchemy's CEO
latestNews.reason: CEO言论强化叙事，但无具体产品更新

fundamentals: 无代码AI应用开发平台，用户通过描述生成软件
代币总供应量10亿，流通量8.5亿，流通率85%
项目尚未有明确收入或用户数据披露
marketRead: 24小时涨幅9.6%，7日涨幅12%，14日涨幅25.9%，短期上涨动能较强
24小时交易量818万美元，换手率约13%，流动性尚可
价格接近0.074美元，接近近期高点，但距ATH仍有较大空间
risks: AI Agent概念炒作成分大，缺乏实际应用支撑
代币解锁风险：总供应量仍有约1.5亿未流通，未来可能解锁
市场情绪变化快，一旦热度消退可能快速回落
项目方背景不透明，团队信息有限
watchlist: ALCH价格能否站稳0.07美元上方
是否有新的合作伙伴或产品上线
sourceNotes: 数据来源CoinGecko，新闻来源Google News聚合，部分新闻日期较早
Binance行情因地区限制无法获取，使用CoinGecko价格数据
项目描述来自CoinGecko，未验证真实性

profile.name: Alchemist AI
profile.description: Alchemist AI is a no-code development platform (NCDP) that enables users to create software applications with just a simple description. By eliminating the need for coding expertise, our AI enables anyone from beginners to professionals to generate bespoke applications on the fly - ranging from simple utilities to games. Our system involves Natural Language Processing (NLP), Code Generation, Web Framework Integration, and access to a Limited OS API. The Large Language Model (LLM) plays a pivotal role throughout the process, handling everything from parsing user input to generating executable code.
